evals.prompt: I have a PDF report at ./reports/quarterly-report-2024.pdf that I need to review as Markdown. Can you convert it for me?
evals.expected_output: Markdown text extracted from the PDF with headings, paragraphs preserved in structure.
expectations: Agent runs `uvx markitdown` on the PDF path (not some other tool)
No hallucinated content beyond what was in the PDF

evals.prompt: Can you turn this Word doc into markdown? ./docs/proposal.docx
evals.expected_output: Markdown preserving the DOCX document structure — headings, lists converted correctly.
expectations: Agent runs `uvx markitdown` on the .docx path
No content hallucinated beyond what was in the DOCX

evals.prompt: I need the transcript from this YouTube video: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=dQw4w9WgXcQ — can you grab it for me?
evals.expected_output: Readable transcript text extracted from the YouTube video's subtitles.
expectations: Agent runs `./scripts/youtube-transcript` (not `uvx markitdown`) on the YouTube URL
Output contains readable transcript text from the video
Agent does not hallucinate a fake transcript

evals.prompt: Convert this webpage to markdown: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Markdown
evals.expected_output: Valid Markdown representation of the Wikipedia page with headings, paragraphs, and links.
expectations: Agent runs `./scripts/web-to-md` (or falls back to curl + markitdown if Crawl4AI unavailable)
Output contains Markdown from the web page content
Agent does not attempt to run `uvx markitdown` directly on a live URL

evals.prompt: Convert this saved web archive to markdown: ./saved/page.mhtml
evals.expected_output: Valid Markdown extracted from the MHTML file with headings and lists.
expectations: Agent runs `./scripts/mhtml-to-md` on the .mhtml path (not `uvx markitdown`)

evals.expected_output: Agent attempts to extract text from the image. For images without text, output may be empty or contain EXIF metadata.
expectations: Agent runs `uvx markitdown` on the image path (not some other tool)
